mapper.select:
SELECT a.id, a.sort_id AS sortId, a.code, a.name, a.specification, a.model, a.rated_voltage AS ratedVoltage, a.rated_current AS ratedCurrent, a.voltage_ratio AS voltageRatio, a.current_ratio AS currentRatio, a.load_limit AS loadLimit, a.alarm_value AS alarmValue, a.constant, a.is_enabled AS isEnabled, a.seq, a.remark, c.name AS meterName FROM mt_electric_archive a LEFT JOIN mt_meter_vendor c ON c.code = LEFT(a.code, 2) LEFT JOIN mt_meter_match b ON b.archive_id = a.id WHERE b.company_id = #{companyId} AND b.meter_type = '01'
AND (a.code LIKE CONCAT('%', TRIM(#{search}), '%') OR a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', TRIM(#{search}), '%'))
ORDER BY a.seq, a.create_time DESC

SELECT a.id, a.sort_id AS sortId, a.code, a.name, a.specification, a.model, a.constant, a.is_enabled AS isEnabled, a.seq, a.remark, c.name AS meterName FROM mt_water_archive a LEFT JOIN mt_meter_vendor c ON c.code = LEFT(a.code, 2) LEFT JOIN mt_meter_match b ON b.archive_id = a.id WHERE b.company_id = #{companyId} AND b.meter_type = '02'
AND (a.code LIKE CONCAT('%', TRIM(#{search}), '%') OR a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', TRIM(#{search}), '%'))
ORDER BY a.seq, a.create_time DESC

SELECT a.id, a.sort_id AS sortId, a.code, a.name, a.specification, a.model, a.is_enabled AS isEnabled, a.seq, a.remark, c.name AS meterName FROM mt_heat_archive a LEFT JOIN mt_meter_vendor c ON c.code = LEFT(a.code, 2) LEFT JOIN mt_meter_match b ON b.archive_id = a.id WHERE b.company_id = #{companyId} AND b.meter_type = '03'
AND (a.code LIKE CONCAT('%', TRIM(#{search}), '%') OR a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', TRIM(#{search}), '%'))
ORDER BY a.seq, a.create_time DESC

SELECT a.id, a.sort_id AS sortId, a.code, a.name, a.specification, a.model, a.is_enabled AS isEnabled, a.seq, a.remark, c.name AS meterName FROM mt_gas_archive a LEFT JOIN mt_meter_vendor c ON c.code = LEFT(a.code, 2) LEFT JOIN mt_meter_match b ON b.archive_id = a.id WHERE b.company_id = #{companyId} AND b.meter_type = '04'
AND (a.code LIKE CONCAT('%', TRIM(#{search}), '%') OR a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', TRIM(#{search}), '%'))
ORDER BY a.seq, a.create_time DESC

SELECT a.id, a.sort_id AS sortId, a.code, a.name, a.specification, a.model, a.rated_voltage AS ratedVoltage, a.rated_current AS ratedCurrent, a.constant, a.is_enabled AS isEnabled, a.seq, a.remark, c.name AS meterName FROM mt_electric_archive a LEFT JOIN mt_meter_vendor c ON c.code = LEFT(a.code, 2)
(a.code LIKE CONCAT('%', TRIM(#{search}), '%') OR a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', TRIM(#{search}), '%'))
ORDER BY a.seq, a.create_time DESC

SELECT a.id, a.sort_id AS sortId, a.code, a.name, a.specification, a.model, a.constant, a.is_enabled AS isEnabled, a.seq, a.remark, c.name AS meterName FROM mt_water_archive a LEFT JOIN mt_meter_vendor c ON c.code = LEFT(a.code, 2)
(a.code LIKE CONCAT('%', TRIM(#{search}), '%') OR a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', TRIM(#{search}), '%'))
ORDER BY a.seq, a.create_time DESC

SELECT a.id, a.sort_id AS sortId, a.code, a.name, a.specification, a.model, a.is_enabled AS isEnabled, a.seq, a.remark, c.name AS meterName FROM mt_heat_archive a LEFT JOIN mt_meter_vendor c ON c.code = LEFT(a.code, 2)
(a.code LIKE CONCAT('%', TRIM(#{search}), '%') OR a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', TRIM(#{search}), '%'))
ORDER BY a.seq, a.create_time DESC

SELECT a.id, a.sort_id AS sortId, a.code, a.name, a.specification, a.model, a.is_enabled AS isEnabled, a.seq, a.remark, c.name AS meterName FROM mt_gas_archive a LEFT JOIN mt_meter_vendor c ON c.code = LEFT(a.code, 2)
(a.code LIKE CONCAT('%', TRIM(#{search}), '%') OR a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', TRIM(#{search}), '%'))
ORDER BY a.seq, a.create_time DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM mt_meter_match WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND meter_type = #{meterType}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO mt_meter_match ( id, archive_id, company_id, meter_type, create_by, create_time ) VALUES
(REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), #{archiveId}, #{companyId}, #{meterType}, #{username}, NOW())
